violations.description: AC1 API ATDD contract test is still skipped.
violations.suggestion: Remove test.skip and make the token-contract assertion executable in CI.

violations.description: AC2 API ATDD primitive-contract test is still skipped.
violations.suggestion: Unskip and verify primitive metadata contract through stable API fixtures.

violations.suggestion: Enable execution to ensure metadata suppression remains merge-blocking.

violations.description: Fallback visibility assertions can mask missing primitive-specific checks.
violations.suggestion: Add explicit failure when expected primitive test ids are absent for covered AC paths.

violations.suggestion: Assert non-empty projection first, then run suppression checks for every item.

recommendations: Unskip all 4 API ATDD tests to restore AC-level contract coverage
Tighten E2E primitive assertions to fail when required primitives are absent

summary: Coverage has a significant API contract gap because all four g-1 ATDD API tests remain skipped.
